pages.text: It's a good idea to think about setting up a base early enough. You can try rushing to Void or even AE if you prefer, but I do not really recommend it... it would be a lot of work for little gain.

To help you in this, powerful building tools are available as early as Tier 1, with ProjectE in Tier 2 for arbitrary building blocks. Ever thought what it's like to build things using Diamond blocks? Go ham!

Or just use Limestone and Basalt like everyone in a certain pack does.
